auth.adminRedirectNotice: We detected admin privileges on your account. Please sign in using the admin portal below.
auth.signUpTitle: Create your Tiba Ya Home account
auth.signUpSuccess: Account created successfully. Check your inbox to verify and then sign in.
auth.signUpError: We could not complete your registration. Please try again.
auth.passwordResetDescription: Enter the email you used to sign up and we will send you a password reset link.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: We have sent reset instructions if that email exists in our records.
auth.passwordResetError: We could not start the reset flow. Please try again.
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your new password below. For security, this link will expire shortly.
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Your password has been updated. Redirecting you to sign in…
auth.resetPasswordError: We could not update your password. Please request a new reset link.
auth.resetPasswordMissingToken: Reset token missing or invalid. Request a new password reset link.
auth.twoFactorDescription: Enter the code from {{method}} to continue.
auth.twoFactorError: We could not verify the code. Try again.

home.client: You are signed in as a client
home.provider: You are signed in as a provider
